allow: PowerShell($envLine = Get-Content ".env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match '^ADMIN_SECRET_TOKEN=' } | Select-Object -First 1; $token = $envLine.Split\('=', 2\)[1].Trim\(\); $body = '{"title":"Duplicate slug check","slug":"top-10-hidden-gems-europe-2026","excerpt":"test","intro":"test"}'; curl.exe -sS -w "`nHTTP:%{http_code}" -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/admin/blogs" -H "Authorization: Bearer $token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary $body)

PowerShell($envLine = Get-Content ".env.local" | Where-Object { $_ -match '^ADMIN_SECRET_TOKEN=' } | Select-Object -First 1; $token = $envLine.Split\('=', 2\)[1].Trim\(\); $body = '{"title":"Duplicate slug check","slug":"top-10-hidden-gems-europe-2026","excerpt":"test","intro":"test"}'; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/admin/blogs" -Method POST -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; "Content-Type" = "application/json" } -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP:$\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $response.Content } catch { Write-Output "HTTP:$\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; Write-Output $_.ErrorDetails.Message })
